user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Arc'teryx
Product type: Alpha SV hardshell jacket
Tone: rugged, performance-driven, premium
Visual style: Clean, minimalist imagery highlighting technical details and extreme outdoor environments.
Conceptual technique: authentic adventure storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Shell of a Different Weather
brief.caption: A lone climber braves a fierce snowstorm, the vibrant red Alpha SV jacket standing out against the monochrome of icy cliffs and swirling whiteout conditions, showcasing unmatched protection.
brief.visual_style: Clean, minimalist imagery highlighting technical details and extreme outdoor environments.
brief.typography_style: Bold, condensed sans-serif with a utilitarian aesthetic
brief.color_scheme: Arc'teryx red, slate grey, and glacier white
